---
title: "My project"
author: "nope"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    toc: true                
    toc-title: My contents   
    toc-location: right 
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 127px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 350px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    theme:  
      light: sketchy
      dark:  darkly
    fontsize: 16px    
self-contained: true #lets other people to see graphs and images that are in the files, makes no changes un the visual
lang: en                
# if i chenge / to \ in images, он мне е складывает в ссылку
---

# Presentation

This is a Ceaser's website.
He is a very stupid kitten. Unfortunately for everyone around, he also is very small and cute. 

![This is NOT him](images/lizard.jpg)


He does not understand this: 
This is an in-line equation $$y = \beta_0 + \beta_1 X + \varepsilon$${#eq-myequation}

This is an  equation $$z = \dfrac{\bar{x} -\mu}{\sigma}$$
(neither am I)

## When will he go home? 

Ideally today
we treid to calculate it in @eq-myequation

### Does he have a litter box?

Not yet

#### Whose fault is that? 

Amazon
